name: Kimi-K2.5
_comment_arch: DeepSeek-V3 architecture (MLA + MoE) per text_config. Vision tower (vt_*) parameters not modeled — multimodal extension off the language path.
_comment_mla: Multi-head Latent Attention (DSv3 family): kv_lora_rank → d_c=512, qk_nope_head_dim=128, qk_rope_head_dim=64, v_head_dim=128, q_lora_rank → d_q_c=1536. Per-token-per-layer KV = (d_c + d_qk_rope) bytes at FP8 = 576 B. n_kv is the canonical n_q=64 and is ignored when mla is present.
_comment_k_active: 8 routed experts + 1 shared expert (always active). Shared expert approximated by k=9.
_comment_n_moe_layers: first_k_dense_replace=1 → first layer is dense, remaining 60 are MoE.
